<think> The UAB Blazers are a college football team from the University of Alabama at Birmingham. They play in the NCAA Division I FBS. To find out which southern conference they belong to, I need to identify the specific conference they are members of. </think>

Explanation: The University of Alabama at Birmingham (UAB) is a member of the Southeastern Conference (SEC) in the NCAA Division I FBS. The SEC is a collegiate athletic conference whose member institutions are located primarily in the Southern United States.
